exit.title: Exit Mod Manager?
exit.message: You have unsynced mods that will not be applied to the game. Are you sure you want to exit?

brownDustXOutdated.title: BrownDustX Outdated
brownDustXOutdated.message: BrownDustX is out of date. Mods will not work until it is updated.

appUpdate.downloaded: v{version} is ready! Click to apply the update

gameLaunched.title: Game Launched
gameLaunched.description: The game has been successfully launched.

unsyncedMods.title: Unsynced Mods Detected
unsyncedMods.message: You have unsynced mods that will not be applied to the game. Do you want to launch the game anyway?

syncMods.title: Sync Mods?
syncMods.message: This will overwrite the mods in your game folder. This action cannot be undone.
syncMods.messageWithConflicts: Some mods have conflicts with each other. The game may fail to launch until conflicts are resolved.
syncMods.symlinkElevationNote: No administrator permission for Symlink. A UAC prompt will appear after this.

unsyncMods.title: Unsync Mods?
unsyncMods.message: This will remove all mods from your game folder. This action cannot be undone.

deleteMod.title: Delete Mod?
deleteMod.message: Are you sure you want to delete mod "{modName}"? This action cannot be undone.
deleteMod.multipleMessage: Are you sure you want to delete these {count} mods? This action cannot be undone.

syncSuccess.title: Mods Synced
syncSuccess.description: Your mods have been successfully synced with the game folder.

unsyncSuccess.title: Mods Unsynced
unsyncSuccess.description: Your mods have been successfully removed from the game folder.

modPreview.title: Cannot Preview Mod
modPreview.modContainErrors: Mod '{modName}' contains errors. Cannot open preview.

errors.modNotDirectory: Mod path for '{modName}' is not a directory.
errors.stagingDirectoryNotFound: Staging directory not found at '{stagingDir}'. Please check your settings.

noModsFound.title: No Mods Found
noModsFound.description: Visit the Mods tab to install mods for this character.

characterModal.discoverModsDescription: Here you can explore all mods available for this character. Note: the list may not include the newest mods. Last updated: {latestUpdate}

noIndexModsFound.title: No Mods Found
noIndexModsFound.description: There are no mods available in the index for this character.

profilesTab.title: Profiles
profilesTab.subtitle: Manage your mod profiles to easily switch between different mod setups.
profilesTab.noProfileSelected: No profile selected. Please select a profile to view its details.

profileCreateFailed.title: Failed to Create Profile
profileCreateFailed.description: An error occurred while creating profile "{profileName}".

profileUpdateFailed.title: Failed to Update Profile
profileUpdateFailed.description: An error occurred while updating profile "{profileName}".

profileDeleteFailed.title: Failed to Delete Profile
profileDeleteFailed.description: An error occurred while deleting profile "{profileName}".

profileSwitchFailed.title: Failed to Switch Profile
profileSwitchFailed.description: An error occurred while switching to profile "{profileName}".

deleteProfile.title: Delete Profile?
deleteProfile.message: Are you sure you want to delete profile "{profileName}"? This action cannot be undone.

createProfile.title: Create New Profile
createProfile.description: Enter a name and an optional description for your new profile.

editProfile.title: Edit Profile
editProfile.description: Edit the name and description of your profile.

descriptions.bepinex: BepInEx is a modding framework. It is required for BrownDustX to work properly.
descriptions.browndustx: BrownDustX is a plugin for BepInEx that adds various quality of life improvements and allows you to use mods in Brown Dust II.
descriptions.configurationManager: Configuration Manager is a plugin for BepInEx that allows you to configure BrownDustX settings in-game.

messages.bepinexMissing: BepInEx is required to run BrownDustX. Please install BepInEx first.
messages.configurationManagerMissing: Configuration Manager is not installed, you won't be able to configure BrownDustX settings in-game.
messages.brownDustXMissing: BrownDustX is not installed. Mods won't load without it.
messages.dragAndDrop: You can also drag and drop a BepInEx or BrownDustX archive here to install it
messages.gameDirectoryNotSet: Game directory is not set. Please set it in the settings first.

removeBepInEx.title: Remove BepInEx?
removeBepInEx.message: Are you sure you want to remove BepInEx? This will remove all BepInEx files from your game directory. This action cannot be undone.

removeBrownDustX.title: Remove BrownDustX?
removeBrownDustX.message: Are you sure you want to remove BrownDustX? This will remove all BrownDustX files from your game directory including all your mods. This action cannot be undone.

removeConfigManager.title: Remove Configuration Manager?
removeConfigManager.message: Are you sure you want to remove Configuration Manager? This will remove all Configuration Manager files from your game directory. This action cannot be undone.

alerts.cautionMessage: Manual install is still preferred. If you already have BepInEx or BrownDustX installed, the installer may not correctly remove existing files. If you installed BepInEx from GitHub and face issues, try the version from the BrownDustX Discord before reporting any bugs.
alerts.danger: Use this feature at your own risk
alerts.dangerMessage: This feature is experimental. We are not responsible for any issues caused to your game installation.

installFromGithub.title: Install from GitHub
installFromGithub.description: Select a version to install from the releases available on GitHub.

options.enableOtherVersions: I accept the risks and want to install other versions

installFromGithub.enableOtherVersionsWarning: Other versions may cause compatibility issues with BrownDustX. If you run into problems, switch back to the recommended version before reporting.

errors.bepinexNotInstalled: BepInEx is not installed. Please install BepInEx first.

logs.gameDirectorySet: Game directory set to {path}. Rechecking installations...
logs.gameDirectoryUnset: Game directory unset. Please set the game directory to manage installations.
logs.unknownArchiveType: Could not determine archive type for: {path}. Rename the file to include 'BepInEx', 'BrownDustX', or 'ConfigManager' in its name.

forceEnglishNames.label: Use English character names
forceEnglishNames.description: Always display character names in English, regardless of the selected language.

modsDirectory.label: Staging Mods Directory
modsDirectory.placeholder: Select a directory to store your mods before syncing

searchRecursively.label: Search Mods Recursively
searchRecursively.description: Enable this option to search for mods in subdirectories of the staging mods directory.

autoSyncMods.label: Auto-Sync Mods
autoSyncMods.description: Enable this option to automatically sync mods to the game folder when they are enabled or disabled.

syncMethod.label: Sync Method
syncMethod.description: How mods are installed into game folder.

uacDeclined.title: Administrator Access Declined
uacDeclined.message: UAC was declined. Sync method reverted to Copy.

visibleColumns.label: Visible Columns
visibleColumns.description: Select which columns are visible in the mod list.

modNameColumn.label: Mod Name Column
modNameColumn.description: Show the mod name with or without subfolders.

characterColumn.label: Character Column
characterColumn.description: Show the character icon, name, or both.

modTypeColumn.label: Mod Type Column
modTypeColumn.description: Show the mod type icon, label, or both.

enableColors.label: Enable Colors for Mod Types
enableColors.description: Apply a color per mod type (standing, cutscene, dating, etc.).

autoCheckForUpdates.label: Auto-Check for Updates
autoCheckForUpdates.description: Enable this option to automatically check for application updates on startup.

autoUpdateModPreview.label: Auto-Update Mod Preview
autoUpdateModPreview.description: Enable this option to automatically check for updates for BD2ModPreview when the application starts and update it if a new version is available.

migration.title: Import from Legacy Version
migration.description: Import profiles and mod authors from v3.2.4 or earlier.

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.description: Select the profiles you want to import from v3.2.4 or earlier.

modAuthors.title: Mod Authors
modAuthors.description: Import mod authors from v3.2.4 or earlier.

importModAuthors.title: Import Mod Authors?
importModAuthors.message: Are you sure you want to import mod authors from the legacy version? This will overwrite the author names of your existing mods with the ones from the legacy version. This action cannot be undone.

importProfilesSuccess.title: Profiles Imported
importProfilesSuccess.description: Profiles have been successfully imported from the legacy version.

importModAuthorsSuccess.title: Mod Authors Imported
importModAuthorsSuccess.description: Mod authors have been successfully imported from the legacy version.

importFailed.title: Import Failed
importFailed.description: An error occurred while importing data: {error}

errorFetchingProfiles.title: Failed to Fetch Profiles
errorFetchingProfiles.description: An error occurred while fetching profiles from the legacy version: {error}

noProfilesToImport.title: No Profiles to Import
noProfilesToImport.description: No profiles were found in the legacy version to import.

noProfilesSelected.title: No Profiles Selected
noProfilesSelected.description: Please select at least one profile to import.

noModAuthorsToImport.title: No Mod Authors to Import
noModAuthorsToImport.description: No mod authors were found in the legacy version to import.

errors.ModsDeleteError: Failed to delete legacy mods file: {message}
errors.ModsRefreshError: Failed to refresh mods after import: {message}

welcome.title: Welcome to BD2ModManager!
welcome.subtitle: It looks like this is your first time launching the app. You can set up your game directory now or skip and do it later in the settings.

selectGameDirectory.title: Game Directory
selectGameDirectory.description: Please, select the the folder containing 'BrownDust II.exe'.

placeholders.gamePath: Path to Brown Dust II game directory

selectGameDirectory.invalidPath: Please select a valid game directory to proceed.

errors.invalidGameExecutable: The selected file is not the Brown Dust II executable.
errors.invalidDirectory: The selected directory does not contain a valid Brown Dust II installation.
errors.noGamePathSelected: No game path selected. Please select a valid game directory to proceed.

betaBanner.message: This is a {beta} of the mod manager. Bugs or unexpected behavior may occur. If you find any issues, please report them on {github}.

supportBanner.title: Support the project ❤️
supportBanner.messageKofi: BD2ModManager is free and open source. If it has been helpful, consider supporting me on Ko-Fi!
supportBanner.messageAfdian: BD2ModManager is free and open source. If it has been helpful, consider supporting me on AfDian!

changeModAuthor.title: Change Mod Author
changeModAuthor.description: Enter a new author name for the mod "{modName}".
changeModAuthor.descriptionMultiple: Enter a new author name for the selected mods.

changeModName.title: Rename Mod
changeModName.description: Enter a new name for the mod "{modName}".

updateAvailable.title: Update Available
updateAvailable.subtitle: A new version is available v{version}.

errors.modAlreadyExists: A mod with the same name already exists.
errors.multipleModsFound: Multiple mods found. Please ensure only one mod is present.
errors.modPreviewContainsErrors: This mod contains errors and cannot be previewed.
errors.gameDirectoryNotSet: Game directory is not set. Please set it in the settings.
errors.stagingDirectoryNotSet: Staging mods directory is not set. Please set it in the settings.
errors.symlinkAdminRequired: Administrator privileges are required to create symbolic links.
errors.removalFailed: Failed to remove file or directory: {error}
errors.invalidMod: The selected file or folder is not a valid BrownDustX mod.
errors.invalidFormat: Unsupported mod format. Please select a valid mod file or folder.
errors.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported file format. Please select a valid mod file or folder.

modErrors.missingTextures: You need to create a folder inside the mod folder named 'textures'.
modErrors.missingModfile: You need to create a .modfile inside this mod folder.
modErrors.archiveNotExtracted: This mod is a compressed file that has not been extracted yet. Please extract it before trying to enable it.
modErrors.shouldBeInFolder: This mod should be inside a folder. Please create a folder with the same name as the mod and move the mod file inside it.
modErrors.missingAtlasFile: This mod is missing the atlas file.
